scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.P2PViewer
scopes.description: Read-only access to P2P Analytics data - procurement reports and dashboards

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.P2PApprover
scopes.description: Full access including approval of PRs, GR posting, and invoice approvals

attributes.name: plant
attributes.description: Restricts access to a specific manufacturing plant

role-templates.name: P2PViewer
role-templates.description: Procurement Analytics Viewer - dashboard and reports access

role-templates.name: P2PApprover
role-templates.description: Procurement Approver - PR approvals, GR postings, invoice verification

role-collections.name: NovaBuild_P2P_Viewer
role-collections.description: Role collection for procurement viewers and analysts

role-collections.name: NovaBuild_P2P_Approver
role-collections.description: Role collection for procurement managers and approvers
